name: UBA : User Attempt to Use Disabled Account
notes: Detects when a user tries to access the organization resources by using a disabled account.
conditions_text: when the event context is Local to Local, Remote to Local
when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Log Source Filters
when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication to Disabled Account, BB:UBA : Disabled Accounts (Kerberos)
TD_list: APPLY UBA : User Attempt to Use Disabled Account on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event context is Local to Local, Remote to Local
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Log Source Filters
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication to Disabled Account, BB:UBA : Disabled Accounts (Kerberos)
RED_list: Event name: UBA : User Attempt to Use Disabled Account
